intro: Notoseris macilenta, also known as the woolly Notoseris, is a small, flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Notoseris macilenta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
